Table of Contents

Sec. 17a-615. (Formerly Sec. 17-258). Interstate Compact on Mental Health.

Sec. 17a-616. Duties of compact administrator.

Sec. 17a-615. (Formerly Sec. 17-258). Interstate Compact on Mental Health. The compact text begins here.

The contracting states agree to cooperate. See section 17a-615.

(P.A. 76-436, S. 367.)

Sec. 17a-616. Duties of compact administrator. The administrator shall carry out the compact.

(P.A. 76-436, S. 368.)
